testcase.name: test_historial_coordinador_access
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_websocket_historial.py:59: in coordinador_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Coordinador login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Coordinador login failed: {"detail":"Credenciales inválidas"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pendientes_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Pendientes should return a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'cambios': [], 'total': 0}, list)
